'''Davonn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] who served in the air forces of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

==Biography==
In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], just after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], Davonn was the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of an [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]] on [[Kwilaan/Legends|Kwilaan]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. He was the leader of [[Guardian flight]].

The [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Majestic Gundark]]'' tried to take off without permission, as it was believed that it was holding an illegal cargo. Davonn and another member of Guardian Flight took off and tried to intercept the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].

Although Davonn could not stop the ''Gundark'' from reaching [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], Davonn managed to track its [[hyperspace vector]]. Davonn reported this information to his superiors, whom would later learn that the ''Gundark'' was going to [[Stend IV]].
